name: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP
notes:
This Building Block triggers when a communication to a cryptocurrency mining IP is detected.

Note: Populate the Cryptocurrency Mining IPs Reference Set with IP addresses to monitor.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote
when any of Destination Address are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining IPs - IP
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote
AND when any of Destination Address are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining IPs - IP
